title: Making Things Happen
excerpt: It's been crazy busy around here. And I like it. I appreciate all the comments and concerns about making sure I get enough rest. I was just vacationing for a few days in Barcelona and Lisbon, remember? (wink, wink). But…
body: It's been crazy busy around here. And I like it. I appreciate all the comments and concerns about making sure I get enough rest. I was just vacationing for a few days in Barcelona and Lisbon, remember? (wink, wink). But honestly, my energy levels are up, just like all my apps and books on pregnancy said they would be in the second trimester, and I am feeling good while trying to balance it all out. I stole a moment yesterday morning to simply make a quick card to put into my Project Life album (which, I am way behind on, but not worried about).
